'''Gnifmak Dymurra''' was the [[Chief Executive Officer/Legends|CEO]] of the [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]. During the [[New Republic era]], Loronar had gained a reputation for corruption, initiating riots on [[Ampliquen]], staging a coup on [[King's Galquek]], committing rights violations in the [[Gantho system/Legends|Gantho system]] and supplying insurgent groups in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] including [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad's]] [[Rationalist Party]] of [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]].

Dymurra also allied himself with [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tol Getelles]] of the [[Antemeridian sector/Legends|Antemeridian sector]]. He resided at Getelles's capital of [[Antemeridias]] and enjoyed the luxuries of a king including having [[sex droid]]s, vibrobaths, plug-ins, [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]], 4 different chefs, self-conforming slippers and independently-controlled artificial environments in every room in his palace.

He also developed a type of remote-control technology known as [[Centrally Controlled Independent Replicant]] which allowed multiple automatons to be controlled by large central computers rather than a large number of miniaturized droid brains. This cut the construction cost for such droids, but the [[Tsil]]s of Nam Chorios were enslaved in order to accomplish the instant communication needed.

After Getelles and Seti Ashgad failed in their plot to take over the Meridian sector and spread the [[Death Seed]] plague, Dymurra was presumably brought to justice. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] punished the Loronar Corporation by making it return the captive Tsils and canceling a shipment of the new [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruisers]] causing the company to come close to bankruptcy.
